title: helictotrichon roylei
intro: Helictotrichon roylei, also known as Royle's feather grass, is a perennial grass native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Helictotrichon roylei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its efficacy and safety as a medicine are not widely documented in modern medical literature.
